ocr_findings.description: BIOS section opening: image shows furigana 'バイオス' above 'BIOS', OCR renders as 'バイスのBIOS' — 'バイオスの' corrupted to 'バイスの', dropping the 'オ' and misplacing 'の', creating a garbled reading
'試験にはコレが出る！' OCR'd as '試験にはつしが出る！' — recurring mascot badge 'コレ' misread as 'つし'

reviewer_notes: Page covers マルチタスク continuation and BIOS 'もう少し詳しく！' sidebar. The BIOS furigana corruption ('バイスの' for 'バイオス') is a med-severity wrong_char as it would confuse a reader. BIOS flow diagram (電源オン→BIOS→OS→アプリ→ユーザー) replaced by image placeholder with only the caption '- BIOSが起動するタイミング' preserved. All other prose faithfully transcribed.
